title: HPKE, Hybrid Encryption, and Envelope Systems · Concurrent Code Workshop
summary: A product-security pair incrementally builds multi-recipient envelope encryption format, changes one attacker-controlled input, and keeps earlier Go, accessibility, secret-lifecycle, testing, and evidence invariants active. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of multi-recipient envelope encryption format while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Combine public-key key establishment with symmetric AEAD for bounded scalable payload encryption and explicit recipient identity.
Use Go HPKE suites and modes with exact KEM, KDF, AEAD, info, associated data, key encoding, and one-shot or context lifecycle.
Generate per-object data keys, wrap them under recipient or key-encryption keys, authenticate metadata, and separate data from key custody.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go Hybrid Encryption
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop cryptographic engineering team handles case 8075 during a signed release review. Build deterministic Go evidence to bind an HPKE or hybrid envelope to recipient, object, suite, payload, and audited rewrap state; reject toy, obsolete, unauthenticated, self-signed-trust, downgrade, and security-by-obscurity shortcuts; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go Hybrid Encryption.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for combine public-key key establishment with symmetric aead for bounded scalable payload encryption and explicit recipient identity. For Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go Hybrid Encryption, keep Crypto Go Hybrid Encryption connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
